top_signals.title: Oil prices fall more than 4% after Rubio says U.S. will give Iran talks 'every chance to succeed'
top_signals.summary: U.S. crude oil prices trim losses as traders assess whether U.S. is nearing a deal with Iran that would restore traffic in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk could become a top 5 corporate bitcoin holder if Tesla and SpaceX merge
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: After Ferrari Luce backlash, Lamborghini CEO says canceling its own EV was the right choice
top_signals.summary: Lamborghini CEO said the automaker's decision to kill its EV to focus on plug-in hybrid electric vehicles was "the right way to go" for his company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New South Wales green lights $497M Copi critical minerals project
top_signals.summary: The mine will produce titanium minerals and rare earth elements including monazite and xenotime.
